title: Living in Boulder vlog 8 - 13 - 2017: Plato. Did two rides over last two days so I'm riding again.

enrichment.summary: Kyle gives a two-day catch-up vlog from Boulder covering his recent cycling (two rides including one where he got a flat without a spare tube), his ongoing project of cataloguing philosophers on his 'education page' (currently focused on Plato's ~3300 pages), and his financial tightness meaning he'll soon run out of weed and needs to budget food spending. He notes he's been feeling physically worse on rides than a few weeks ago and hopes today's ride will be better.
enrichment.speaker: kyle
topics: Plato and ancient philosophy reading list

stances.topic: working at a computer all day
stances.position: done with that — won't go back to it
prefers outdoor riding for the adventure and mountain scenery
loves it — so many cool rides, still feels like a tourist
running out is probably good since it will cut food/money spending

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He was living in Boulder, Vila on August 13th and 12th of 2017.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He didn't do the video the last couple days because he was too wrapped up in working on his ancient book.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He changed books and updated his education page, which now has around 3300 pages of writing.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He thinks he has to do Aristotle next but is currently ensuring all the existing content is on the page.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He wants to add more content from another page but is prioritizing biking over working on the computer.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He could write while biking on rollers but prefers to write outside for adventure and enjoyment.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He is really high right now and has a little bit of weed left.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He won't be able to afford more weed, which will help him save money on food.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He finds supermarket food expensive and prefers to prepare his own meals.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Drinking juice adds up because he consumes a lot, costing around three bucks per drink.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He wants to smoke a lot of weed and enjoy good rides while high.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He transferred his weed from a big container to smaller ones, which are now full.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He did two rides, one of which resulted in a flat tire.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He forgot his keys three times and had to retrieve them from his mom's workplace.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: His pump is small and takes a long time to inflate tires, so he didn't fully inflate his tire after the flat.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: The next day, he rode to the top of a neighborhood climb but felt sick and exhausted.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He doesn't feel as good now as he did a couple of weeks ago when he started riding.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He hopes his fatigue will go away so he can continue biking.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He is now logging his bicycling activities, not just working on his website.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: There are many cool rides to do around Boulder, but he's unsure if he'll be fit enough to complete them this summer.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He needs to assess the amount of time he has left for biking.
